description_en: General traffic rule violation where no specific penalty is prescribed
Violation of road regulations or road markings
Disobedience of lawful direction or refusal to share required information
Allowing an unauthorised or unlicensed person to drive
Driving without a valid driving licence
Driving despite disqualification or furnishing materially false information
Overspeeding by light motor vehicle or standard private vehicle
Overspeeding by heavy goods vehicle or passenger transport vehicle
Dangerous or reckless driving including handheld device distraction
imprisonment: Up to 1 year on repeat offence

description_en: Driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs - first offence
Driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs - repeat offence within 3 years
Using a transport vehicle without permit or beyond permit conditions
Overloading a goods carriage beyond permissible limit
Carrying excess passengers in a transport vehicle (per excess passenger)
Failure to use seat belt or child restraint where required
Violation of motorcycle safety measures including triple riding
Failure to wear protective headgear on a two-wheeler
Failure to give free passage to an emergency vehicle
Using horn unnecessarily or in a notified silence zone
School bus or educational institution vehicle safety contravention using a minimum doubled penalty placeholder
imprisonment: Actual amount depends on underlying offence

description_en: Driving without valid insurance cover
imprisonment: Up to 3 months on repeat offence

description_en: Offence by company or person in charge where liability follows the underlying contravention
Juvenile driving offence attributed to guardian or owner
imprisonment: Up to 3 years and vehicle registration suspension

description_en: Compounding of offences by police officer or other prescribed authority for minor violations
General penalty for contravening provisions where no specific penalty is prescribed
Power of police officer to arrest without warrant for certain offences under the Act
Power of police officer to detain vehicle used in contravention of the Act
Double penalty applies if the same offence is committed from a vehicle with a learner licence
